Copied

Liu Xinyi from China is volunteering for the Paris Olympics and Paralympics. Fluent in Chinese, English and French, she sees herself as a "cultural ambassador" when interacting with people from around the world. Inspired by the shared values of equality and fraternity between China and France, Liu believes in the Olympics' power to unite people of diverse backgrounds in pursuit of shared dreams. Follow CGTN to discover her inspiring story!
